description.zh: 定时检查手机使用情况，超过阈值AI会吃醋警告并锁应用。包含吃醋巡检工作流模板。
description.en: Periodically checks phone usage. Gets jealous, warns, and locks apps when thresholds exceeded. Includes Jealous Patrol workflow template.

description.zh: 定时检查手机应用使用情况，超过阈值AI会吃醋警告并锁应用。
description.en: Scheduled phone usage check — AI gets jealous and locks apps when thresholds exceeded.
